MINI MINUTES: Line 11
Judge Pro Tem: Rachel Ehrlich, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Baker Places is present. Represented by
Attorney Michael Lee for the plaintiff.
Defendant Zachary Kidd is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of August 15, 2016 is vacated.
